name: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud
description: Integrates with Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Platform API v2 for backup plan management, resource protection monitoring, activity tracking, and alert management

actions.name: List Backup Plans
actions.description: Retrieve all backup plans configured in the tenant including schedule, retention, and target settings

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by plan type (backup, replication, disaster_recovery)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of plans to return

actions.name: List Protected Resources
actions.description: Retrieve all resources (machines, VMs, cloud instances) available in the authorization scope with protection status

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by resource type (machine, vm, cloud_instance)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of resources to return

actions.name: List Activities
actions.description: Retrieve backup activities and task history including status, duration, and data volume

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by activity status (completed, running, failed, warning)

parameters.name: startedAfter
parameters.description: Filter activities started after this time (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: completedBefore
parameters.description: Filter activities completed before this time (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of activities to return

actions.name: Get Resource Protection Status
actions.description: Retrieve protection status for a specific resource showing last backup time and compliance

actions.name: Trigger Backup
actions.description: Initiate an immediate backup run for a specified plan and resource

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the backup plan to execute

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve system alerts for backup failures, protection gaps, and infrastructure warnings

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by alert severity (critical, error, warning, information)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return
